tldr: Swap Prove's phone-intelligence KYC for Persona's modular, rule-based verification platform with usage pricing.
why_switch: Modular flows (KYC, KYB, document, database) instead of a phone-first pipeline
Usage-based pricing aligned to successful verifications
Broader global document coverage beyond US carrier data
Custom rule-based decisioning in a visual editor
Mature SDKs for web and mobile
what_to_export: Stored identity attributes (name, DOB, address, document refs)
export_method: Request a structured export from Prove via account management and simultaneously snapshot data you already persist from webhooks. Maintain your own database as the source of truth across the cutover. Refer to Prove's current documentation for the exact export procedure.
import_method: Configure a Persona Inquiry template that matches your required identity fields, deploy the SDK on your sign-up surfaces, and route new users through Persona while old Prove records remain read-only. Consume Persona webhooks to mirror outcomes into your database. Consult Persona's official docs for current API paths, SDK versions and template configuration.

concept_mapping.note: Inquiry is the umbrella object for a verification attempt
Use a separate signal vendor or rely on document + selfie
Rebuild logic in the visual workflow editor
Forecast monthly volume to avoid surprises

gotchas: Pay-per-verification can spike during fraud waves — set anomaly alerts
Workflow logic must be re-implemented; no lift-and-shift of rules
Phone-centric anti-fraud signals from Prove are not 1:1 reproducible
Persona Inquiry templates deeply influence drop-off rates — A/B test before cutover
Confirm data residency and sub-processor list with your compliance lead
Keep Prove logs accessible for as long as regulators require

email.subject: Notice of non-renewal — Prove
email.body:
Hello Prove team,

We will be migrating identity verification to a different provider and do not plan to renew the current agreement.

Could you confirm the renewal date, the process for exporting our verification records and audit logs, and the timeline for data deletion after termination?

Thanks for the partnership.

Best regards,
